talk.whereAmI: How did you find me? And where am I?

merchant.mapOfferMessage: Oh yeah, I could sell you a map I suppose...

mapTouchMessages.0: Please don't start touching my wares.
mapTouchMessages.1: Don't touch it, please. Letting customers handle the wares decreases their value dramatically!
mapTouchMessages.2: Ok, whatever. You can keep it. I wouldn't know of anyone ever buying it anyways.

merchant.stickOfferMessage: Oh, you are interested in my stick? I suppose I could sell it...

hatMessages.3: Come on, please leave me alone.
hatMessages.4: Ok, ok. I give you a Discount, how about that?
hatMessages.5: Please, I don't know what else to do. Another Discount maybe?
hatMessages.7: Ok, 60! 60 is all I can do!
hatMessages.8: That's it. For you, I make it 70 again. And now keep your hands to yourself!

local.title: Local save
local.warning: Saves stay on this browser and device. Do not clear site data or you may lose them.

restart.confirm: Restart the game? Unsaved progress since your last save will be lost.

text.title: Text save / load
text.help: Export copies your game as JSON. Paste that text on another browser or device and load it here.
text.exportPlaceholder: Click export to fill this area…

errors.invalid_slot: That save slot is not valid.
errors.invalid_payload: That save file is not valid.
errors.invalid_state: That save file is missing game data.
errors.corrupt_save: That save could not be read. It may be corrupt.
errors.quota_exceeded: Could not save: browser storage is full.

about.whoDesign: Game design & code by Theladron. Inspired by the great Candy Box games by Aniwey.
about.whoArtists: ASCII art by Andreas Freise, Martin Brunzel, Theladron, Aniwey. Please visit and support <link>asciiart.eu</link>.
about.licenseCode: The game source code is published under the GPLv3. You may modify and redistribute it, even for commercial purposes, under the terms of that license.
about.licenseArt: ASCII art in this game comes from several artists and sources. It is not necessarily licensed for commercial reuse. Credit the artists, respect their terms, and do not redistribute the art separately without permission.
about.thankYou: I want to give a huge thank you to Aniwey, the original creator. I was inspired by his games, fascinated by the simplistic style and addictive gameplay, and wanted to create a worthy successor.
about.contact: Feel free to contact me at <email>phil.wolframm@gmail.com</email> if you have any comments or questions.
